message:
feat(security): add semantic event and error aliases to intent firewall (bd-3l2p)

Add semantic event constants (FIREWALL_REQUEST_CLASSIFIED,
FIREWALL_INTENT_BENIGN, FIREWALL_INTENT_RISKY,
FIREWALL_CHALLENGE_ISSUED, FIREWALL_VERDICT_RENDERED) and semantic
error constants (ERR_FIREWALL_CLASSIFICATION_FAILED,
ERR_FIREWALL_CHALLENGE_TIMEOUT, ERR_FIREWALL_SIMULATE_FAILED,
ERR_FIREWALL_QUARANTINE_FULL, ERR_FIREWALL_RECEIPT_UNSIGNED) to
satisfy bd-3l2p acceptance criteria for intent firewall observability.

Also adds IntentClassificationReport struct, FirewallReceipt with
signature fields, and expanded tests for classification, challenge,
and verdict audit trail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
